content.preview: [WHERE-HIT] nth_find (kind: lemma) * In [lemmas or axioms]: lemma nth_find ['a]: forall (z0 : 'a) (p : 'a -> bool) (s : 'a list), has p s => p (nth z0 s (find p s)).
